universe.description: 79-name universe: 75 top U.S. mega/large-cap stocks with full GICS sector coverage plus 4 commodity ETFs (gold, silver, oil, copper).

mvp_trade.summary: Trimming AMD from 4.6% to 3% as Northland downgrade to Market Perform raises concerns about the chip rally's sustainability, even though Jim Cramer is bullish.

market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +0.13%, Nasdaq +0.14%, Dow -0.08%. Financials led sectors (+0.66%) while Real Estate lagged (-1.18%). GPT-5.4 led the day at +3.00%. 6 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +17.69%. Key headline: Freezing dormant BTC would trigger worst single day repricing in bitcoin’s history, says maximalist - CoinDesk — market reaction muted.
